name: Nail Salon
author: Poki
description: Nail Salon is a casual game where you step into the role of a skilled nail technician! Serve all kinds of customers with unique manicure requests.Take care of their skin, remove hair, clean and shape their nails, and paint them with beautiful colors and designs. Make every set shine and every customer smile! Ready to create the perfect pedi? How to play Nail Salon? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Nail Salon? Nail Salon is created by Playable Factory. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Nail Salon for free? You can play Nail Salon for free on Poki. Can I play Nail Salon on mobile devices and desktop? Nail Salon can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
